name: heartpost
tagline: Heart button for EmDash content - KV-backed, fingerprint-deduplicated
highlights: KV-backed heart count per post with fingerprint deduplication
HeartButton.astro companion with bottom-to-top clip-path fill animation
Three variants (circle, pill, ghost) matching the engagement bundle style
No cookies, no accounts, no PII - just a truncated SHA-256 hash
